or deceptive conduct

Um, introducing clear definitions within the Fair Trading

Importantly, the commission also noted that a review

to strengthen protections by increasing penalties
and improving deterrence against misleading labeling.
We believe this review offers the perfect opportunity

And ethical producers deserve a level playing field where,
where misleading claims are not tolerated.
With vegetarian vegetarianism

what they buy and consume.

Thursday, 16 October 2025 | Primary Production

Petition of Vegan Society of Aotearoa: Ensure accurate labelling of vegetarian and vegan products and Petition of NZ Vegetarian Society: Ensure Accurate Labelling of Vegetarian and Vegan Products
